comment: Sonatina Symphonic Orchestra solo Violin — purpose-built sample-library
legato sustains, sampled at minor thirds (G3, A#3, C#4, E4, G4, ...,
C#7 — noteSemis [1,4,7,10] picks exactly those four per octave).
Lowercase filenames with literal `#` for sharps (`violin-a#4.wav`);
the source repo is case-sensitive, uppercase 404s. The {NOTE_LOWER}
placeholder produces the lowercased note name; sharps URL-encode to
%23 at fetch. Hosted via raw.githubusercontent.com — jsdelivr's CDN
returns intermittent 404s and multi-second hangs on these WAVs.
First instrument migrated to the segment-based pipeline (see prepareLoop
